lore.english:
Demon. Born from a demonic magic experiment. A vampire that continues the ancestors' bloodline. Her father is the king of vampires who possesses ultimate magic powers. She's naturally insane, and those who try to come between her and her father will not be forgiven, even if they're her sisters.

She's currently under the protection of Edwin Black, but she roams freely between the demon realm and the human realm.

She inherited the blood of the first of her kind, so she possesses demonic powers that exceed that of a high rank demon. Born with a vampire's high regenerative ability, she can conjure and control a "shadow blade" that corrodes everything it touches.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Blood Scythe[-]
skills.description:
Approaches the enemy cheerfully and strikes with a scythe.
If the target is inflicted with [&Bleeding], increases [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] equal to [&Color_Cyan][V3:300102]%[-] of the target's lost [&HP].
skills.description_readable:
Approaches the enemy cheerfully and strikes with a scythe.
If the target is inflicted with [&Bleeding], increases [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] equal to [V3:300102]% of the target's lost [&HP].

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Seven Hells[-]
skills.description:
After launching the enemy into the air, jumps up and attacks 4 times in total.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:300203]%) [&Bleeding][-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:300203]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:300203] turn(s)
When [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_3004] is on [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime], performs an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack] 1 time.
When performing an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack], increases [&Bleeding] effect by [&Color_Cyan][V3:300204]%[-].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:300204] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
After launching the enemy into the air, jumps up and attacks 4 times in total.
Target hit is inflicted with ([V3:300203]%) [&Bleeding] at a [R:300203]% chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:300203] turn(s)
When [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_3004] is on [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime], performs an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack] 1 time.
When performing an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack], increases [&Bleeding] effect by [V3:300204]%.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:300204] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Immortal Hunting[-]
skills.description:
Strikes an enemy with a scythe.
[&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] increases by [&Color_Cyan][V3:300303]%[-] for each [&Bleeding] the target has.
Increases turns of all the [&Buff]s on the character [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter] by [V2:300304] turn(s).
Steals [&Athanasia] from the target [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore].
Attacks an enemy once.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Vampire Princess[-]
skills.description:
Gains an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddTurn] when killing an enemy.
If [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_3004] is on [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime], increases [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:300402]%)[-].
